Name: Need to understand something
Description: User needs help understanding app features, pricing, how charging works, or general FAQ-type questions.

Name: Problem with my wallet
Description: Issues related to wallet balance, deposits, withdrawals, incorrect charges, or payment transaction failures.

Name: Need to report a problem
Description: User wants to report a bug, app crash, technical issue, or unexpected behavior in the application.

Name: Problem with my last activity
Description: Issues with a recent charging session such as incorrect billing, incomplete process, wrong rating, or dispute with the other party.

Name: Problem with something else
Description: Any issue that does not fit into the other categories, including account problems, suggestions, or general feedback.
